name: Team RWBY // Spawn of Salem
description:
(Proxies enabled across the board!)

The 5th child of Salem, and the only living successor she has. Ever since your lively hood became known, both sides of the war sent people scrambling to find you, as you might be a valuable piece in ending the war.

3/5. Two more requests. Drop em or lose em.

Artist~

creator: BrokenMoonBlade
